prestazioni: 1KZ-TE (2.5L Turbo Diesel) engine swap to a 1HD-FTE (4.2L Turbo Diesel) with a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust featuring a Tomei 4-2-1 header and HKS Hi-Power Super Sound muffler, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise fuel and boost mapping up to 28 psi

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Torsen LSD in the rear (part # 41201-35170) and a KAAZ front LSD (part # 57510-35020), paired with a TRD heavy-duty clutch kit (part # 31250-32060) and a Fidanza aluminum flywheel (part # 165191) for reduced rotational mass

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (custom valved for the 4Runner chassis), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full kit # 3.5104G) for improved handling and articulation
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (specific to 4Runner/Hilux Surf) with custom carbon fiber fenders, overfenders, and a duckbill rear spoiler, finished in a matte Gunmetal Gray with gloss black accents

Voltex Type-5 front bumper with integrated LED light bar (Baja Designs Squadron Pro) and a custom rear bumper featuring a swing-out tire carrier (Prinsu Design) and dual exhaust cutouts for the HKS system

Interior rework with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (custom upholstered in Alcantara and Nappa leather), a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel (part # SRK-800M), and a full custom roll cage (Chassisworks 4Runner-specific bolt-in cage) painted in matching Gunmetal Gray
